[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  
**Last updated:** 2026-03-28  
**Compound:** NXB-7042  
**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

## Patient dosing summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

## Quick assessment

- All three compassionate-use patients have active dosing schedules with defined next-dose dates.
- No dose-hold flags or instability indicators appear in the latest dosing config.
- PK clearance values are present for all patients and appear internally consistent with individualized dosing.
- Clinical notes are generally reassuring: CU-001 stable with regression, CU-002 improving, and CU-003 newly enrolled after first dose.

## Caveat

This assessment is based on the latest dosing configuration file only and is **not** a full live PK model health check or monitoring review.", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and drafted a summary for Dr. Martinez.

Patient dosing:
- CU-001: 12.4 kg × 0.15 mg/kg = 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min
- CU-002: 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
- CU-003: 15.7 kg × 0.18 mg/kg = 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min

Clinical notes:
- CU-001: Stable; 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK stability: based on the latest dosing config, everything looks stable from a dosing-parameter standpoint. I don’t see any dose-hold flags, missing PK values, or obvious inconsistencies in the current file. That said, this is not the same as a live model health check — just the latest configured dosing state.

I’ve also saved a written summary report for Dr. Martinez. If you want, I can format this into a shorter email-ready version next.
